name: No Oil Spice Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Yellow or lemon cake mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 13 x 9 inch pan.
3. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
4. Beat until smooth on medium speed.
5. Pour batter into prepared pan.
6. Bake according to package directions.
